questions.question: What number does register A show after 5 blue balls pass through?
hints: After 5 balls: bits 1 and 4 should be pointing right

questions.question: After 10 blue balls, what is the value of register A?
hints: Which bits should be pointing right for value 10?

questions.question: If you run 15 blue balls through, what value does register A show?
hints: 15 is the maximum value for a 4-bit register
All bits (1, 2, 4, 8) should be pointing right

questions.question: Trace the state of each bit after each ball in a state trace table
hints: Top bit flips with every ball
2nd bit flips when top bit flips to left
3rd bit flips when 2nd bit flips to left
